programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the Baltimore Ravens' big 38-10 win over the Carolina Panthers in Week 4 of the 2021 season. WR Steve Smith Sr. gets payback against his former team in a big way, going off for 139 yards and 2 TDs on 7 receptions.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Tom Brady makes his highly-anticipated return to New England as the Tampa Bay Buccaneers visit the Patriots.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Brett Favre returns to Lambeau and beats up his former team as the Vikings beat the Packers, 38-26.

programme.title: NFL 360
programme.desc: Raiders linebacker Carl Nassib comes out as gay and helps transform lives, and Super Bowl champion Osi Umenyiora helps Nigerian prospects escape dramatic hardships.

programme.title: NFL Films Presents
programme.sub-title: Jeff Rohrer, Esera Tuaolo, Vince Lombardi - Pride Month
programme.desc: Jeff Rohrer, Esera Tuaolo, and Vince Lombardi are LGBTQ+ allies in sports, advocating for visibility and acceptance. Celebrate their contributions during Pride Month.

programme.title: NFL Media Originals
programme.desc: This Pride Month, the NFL honors Richard Fierro for his acts of bravery as he and other survivors of the shooting share their stories of healing, the importance of safe spaces and their hope for unity in the future.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Sam Darnold leads the Minnesota Vikings to 5-0 in London against Aaron Rodgers and the New York Jets, 23-17. Rodgers threw 3 INTs on the day before getting twisted up awkwardly while getting tackled by several Vikings defenders.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: Highlights from 1994 Week 2 game between the San Francisco 49ers and Kansas City Chiefs!

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: San Francisco eyes revenge in its third straight NFC Championship meeting with Dallas, who won the previous two matchups.

programme.title: NFL Top 10
programme.desc: From Spygate to Brett Favre's return to Green Bay, the 10 best grudge matches in NFL history.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Watch the matchup between the New York Jets and the New England Patriots during the 2010 Divisional Round where the New York Jets reached their second straight AFC championship game with a stunning 28-21 win over the New England Patriots.

programme.title: NFL Football
programme.sub-title: 2022 NFC Wild Card: New York Giants vs. Minnesota Vikings
programme.desc: From Jan. 15, 2023.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Harrison Butker sent a 45-yard kick through cold, gusting wind over the crossbar with 3 seconds to go, and put the Chiefs back in the Super Bowl for the third time in four years with a 23-20 victory.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Harrison Butker sent a 45-yard kick through cold, gusting wind over the crossbar with 3 seconds to go, and put the Chiefs back in the Super Bowl for the third time in four years with a 23-20 victory.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Colin Kaepernick ran for a quarterback-record 181 yards and two touchdowns and threw two scoring passes to Michael Crabtree in leading the San Francisco 49ers to a 45-31 victory against the Green Bay Packers during the divisional round.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Colin Kaepernick ran for a quarterback-record 181 yards and two touchdowns and threw two scoring passes to Michael Crabtree in leading the San Francisco 49ers to a 45-31 victory against the Green Bay Packers during the divisional round.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Green Bay Packers quarterback Jordan Love passed for 360 yards and three touchdowns as Green Bay raced past Aaron Rodgers and the Pittsburgh Steelers 35-25 in what in many ways felt and looked like an official passing of the torch.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: A PSA that takes on cheaters in charity golf scrambles; how surfers and skateboarders are changing golf.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: Halley talks to Stephen Curry, Ray Romano, Tony Romo, and Charles Barkley to get advice at the American Century Championship in Lake Tahoe.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: Hally is haunted by an apparition; Emilia Migliaccio's decision to join golf media rather than turn pro.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick provides a prescription to create more structure during putting practice sessions. McCormick shares four practice games, which are designed to hone aim and accuracy, develop better speed control and avoid three putts.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick uses a series of skill-based games to demonstrate how becoming more adept at distance control and trajectory can create consistency in performance.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are giving a guide that will make 2024 your best year ever on the course; learn how to put your hands on the club like Tiger Woods, improve your accuracy like Ben Hogan and use baseball to hit your golf ball farther.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to drive it longer like a Major Champion; learn a backswing move used by Scottie Scheffler, downswing stretch taught by Jack Nicklaus and solid contact drill straight from Padraig Harrington.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach setup keys, swing changes and creative drills to find more fairways; Martin will also reveal a swing thought that's helped Rory McIlroy become one of the world's best drivers.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to lower your scores by hitting more greens; find out how to set up for success like Xander Schauffele, improve your pivot like Tom Watson and learn a drill used by Tiger Woods to hit laser-like irons.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to control your ball flight like the best players; learn how to draw the ball on command like Rory McIlroy, hit powerful fades like Scottie Scheffler and rip low stingers down the fairway like Tiger Woods.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to improve your accuracy and distance; set up for success like Tommy Fleetwood, improve your swing path like Nelly Korda and learn a drill that helped Morgan Pressel win a Major Championship.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the most important keys to getting up and down around the green; learn how to set up for success like Phil Mickelson, make solid wedge contact like Luke Donald and control trajectory like Tiger Woods.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach putting grips, styles and drills used by the world's best players; learn how to stop pushing putts like Tiger Woods, eliminate the pull like Scottie Scheffler and put better roll on the ball like Dave Stockton.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to stick your mid-range to full swing wedge shots; learn how to make solid contact like Collin Morikawa, hit it straight down your target line like Steve Stricker and control distance like Rory McIlroy.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach drills to cure the worst swing faults; learn how to improve your swing plane like Tiger Woods, use a pool noodle to eliminate the chicken wing and fix numerous faults that cause a slice.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: One competitor pulls off a shot that was thought to be virtually impossible.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Following a string of dominant performances, one competitor is targeted for elimination by the remaining competitors.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: With numbers dwindling, one of the five remaining competitors will have one, and only one, opportunity to play their way into the final four.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: With the final four determined, the waning daylight may delay the competition.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Final three golfers battle to stay alive.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Final head-to-head matchup will determine the champion of Big Break: Prince Edward Island.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to stick your mid-range to full swing wedge shots; learn how to make solid contact like Collin Morikawa, hit it straight down your target line like Steve Stricker and control distance like Rory McIlroy.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach drills to cure the worst swing faults; learn how to improve your swing plane like Tiger Woods, use a pool noodle to eliminate the chicken wing and fix numerous faults that cause a slice.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the best drills from the best guests in School of Golf history; Martin will also reveal the most special guest in the show's 15-year history and teach a tip that helped them become a champion.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: We celebrate the final chapter of School of Golf with Martin Hall; the Professor teaches the drills that have helped the most players over the past 15 seasons.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Playing Downwind and Into the Wind
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty breaks down the art of playing downwind and into the wind. Nick will guide you through techniques to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust your club selection to take full advantage of the wind.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Right to Left Left to Right
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty teaches techniques and tips for achieving excellent golf performance when playing into the wind. He shows how to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust club selection to make the most of the weather conditions.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Fitness tips to improve one's game.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Chris Como to answer questions covering how to get more distance, the keys to hitting fairway woods, how to play shots from the rough and much more.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Chris Como to answer questions covering distance keys, his pre-shot routine, shot shaping and playing in windy conditions.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Olympic legend Michael Phelps leads Rory McIlroy to discuss what he feels throughout his swing with driver, and how to hit a driver more consistently.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy examines the swing of NFL cornerback Sauce Gardner and explains why a better takeaway might help him hit his driver better.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal help improve your game while answering viewer questions.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: Cead Mile Failte - A Hundred Thousand Welcomes
programme.desc: Twelve aspiring golf professionals from all over the world and from many different backgrounds arrive in Ireland. The players are divided into mixed-teams where they will not only be competing as a team, but living together as well.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The competition heats up in Ireland as one team fights to stay together. Personalities clash when poor play by a captain forces their team to go to elimination.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: A competitor's life is threatened by a serious illness as the team fights to stay out of elimination; the teams are driven to the edge.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: One team's recent success is short-lived as news of their fallen teammate spells potential disaster. A remarkable hole-out decides the fate of one captain, leaving the other staring elimination in the face.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Poor play by one golfer causes deep and irreparable divides within the house. A surprising decision by a captain leaves their team and fate on the brink of elimination.

programme.title: GolfPass
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The competitors take a road trip to one of Ireland's premiere links courses where the wind and two players' emotions try to blow the teams apart. Distrust and dislike forces one team to put emotions aside for the betterment of the group.

programme.title: The Big Break
